name: IgniteBot
description: Full-featured WhatsApp Bot with 30+ features: AI chat, sticker maker, media downloader, group management, e-commerce, booking system, analytics dashboard and more.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for AI Chat, Image Generation, and Text-to-Speech. Get yours at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

ADMIN_NUMBERS.description: Comma-separated admin phone numbers in international format WITHOUT the + sign. Example: 12345678901,447911123456
